duplicate_boundary_checks.result: No pre-existing yusur-k2-pro-dpu or yusur-swift-2200n-pro SKU row; added two product-specific rows only.
Existing Yusur rows were raw comparison rows. The update adds resolved-field references while preserving comparison-only boundary text for unsupported metrics.
K2-Pro and SWIFT evidence is kept as product-specific DPU/SmartNIC catalog or comparison evidence, not a general NVMe-oF, benchmark, operations, or SLO claim.

Only hardware-accelerator and network-storage-cluster layers were updated; blocked KServe, inference-serving postmortem, MLCommons exact-result, and RAG propagation/drift/alert/cost gaps remain unresolved.
Added a separate known_source entry for parent-3 Yusur DPU fields without mutating blocked_items or existing blocked coverage_gaps.
Added a new done entry for the bounded Yusur parent task.

gap_reason: The local corpus already contained product-specific Yusur K2-Pro and SWIFT-2200N Pro captures with schema-supported DPU fields that had not yet been promoted into the structured accelerator catalog.

schema_boundary.boundary: Not promoted because spec-fields.yaml has no DOE/table-lookup performance field.
Not promoted because spec-fields.yaml has no on-chip NoC throughput or packet-rate field.

schema_boundary.source_value: K2-Pro NVMe-oF acceleration engine and 2M IOPS
schema_boundary.boundary: NVMe-oF remains protocol/offload evidence and the 2M IOPS value is not mapped to storage_read_iops or storage_write_iops because the source does not state read/write direction, block size, or storage configuration.

schema_boundary.source_value: SWIFT-2200N Pro PCIe one-way pass-through latency below 230ns, 1/2 RTT loopback latency 1us, and network jitter below 20ns
schema_boundary.boundary: Comparison-only latency evidence; spec-fields.yaml has storage added-latency fields but no general network latency or jitter fields.

non_promoted_boundaries: No Dayu, Nebula, Asterfusion, Resnics, Corigine, Huawei, Biren, Cambricon, Kunlunxin, or other accelerator row was modified except as comparison-boundary text.
No benchmark, production-operations, storage-performance, protocol, or SLO claim was promoted from the Yusur captures.
No blocked KServe, inference-serving postmortem, MLCommons exact-result, or RAG propagation/drift/alert/cost source family was retried.
